creator: alexander@polyvizor.com
text:
mail/milter-greylist-devel port use the same version of software (milter-greylist-4.6.2.tgz with same MD5) as main mail/milter-greylist port. These ports are updated all together for along time at the same dates. The only difference between them is DKIM option in devel port referring to mail/opendkim port which is stable for a long time.

May be it is better to add DKIM option to main port and close devel one as there are no other differences?
